records.ety: [OE. garnisoun, F. garnison garrison, in OF. & OE. also, provision, munitions, from garnir to garnish. See Garnish.]

defs: A body of troops stationed in a fort or fortified town.
A fortified place, in which troops are quartered for its security.

records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Garrisoned (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Garrisoning.]

defs: To place troops in, as a fortification, for its defense; to furnish with soldiers; as, to garrison a fort or town.
To secure or defend by fortresses manned with troops; as, to garrison a conquered territory.
